notes: v0.3.0 — NEW: AI Watch tab. AI sits in the background while you draw and gives feedback every N seconds. ViewObserver-based debounced capture (5/15/30/60s after view settles) → POST to Poe vision model (Gemini 2.5 Flash default) → live observation feed in tray. 9 watch models incl. Seed-2.0-Mini for cheapest, Claude Opus 4.7 for deepest analysis. Daily cost meter, persistent JSONL log per day. Custom watch prompt separate from render prompt.
